SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-13-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:00 AM
Judge Pro Tem Richard Wise, clerk Jean Kong, not reported, D525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Ronald Konopaski,appears in Pro Per with witnesses - Paul Newmann and Henry Maltez; Respondent, Kyrsten Gallo, appears in Pro Per. Parties, previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Wise.
